curation_notes: Re-curation. Patch commit is merge commit 3b9ac4403c2756dc89a5ed3cdcefe688458588aa in free5gc/ausf (PR #52). Only 1 source file changed with 10 lines added. The fix adds two nil existence checks in the resynchronization branch of UeAuthPostRequestProcedure: one for the SUCI-SUPI pair mapping and one for the AUSF UE context, both before performing interface type assertions that would panic on nil values. No sibling locations — the only other file in the processor directory is processor.go, and other call sites of the same functions already have proper nil checks. Vulnerability class null-deref confirmed from CWE-476 and the patch diff. L3 hints improved to be more specific than L1/L2 (mentioning UE authentication resync flow and SBI layer).
